features.description: Base capability. Every tenant has at least one Region (the auto-provisioned default). Always on across every tier.
Tenant can create more than one Region beyond the default. Off on small tier (locked to 1 region — the default). Medium up to 3; Enterprise unlimited. Backed by the `region_slot` entitlement.

Tenant can define multiple tax rates per Region via the `tax_config.rates[]` array (e.g. reduced VAT for children's programmes, luxury tax, alcohol tax). Enterprise-only. Backed by the `region_custom_tax_rules` entitlement.

Tenant can pause a Region (blocking new bookings + memberships while existing rows survive). All tiers can pause; Small tier is limited because they only have one Region and pausing the default is forbidden.
Tenant can archive a Region (soft-delete, 730-day retention). Small tier cannot archive because they only have the default region. Medium + Enterprise can archive non-default regions.
Tenant can edit tax_config retroactively — changes replay against already-issued Invoices. Enterprise-only + off by default even for Enterprise (per-tenant activation gate). Wave 3 feature.
Tenant can capture + display their tax registration number (VAT registration, TRN, GSTIN, EIN). All tiers. Field is confidential — redactor gates egress to `regions.view.tax_registration` permission.
